articles.title: Jaylen Brown has 30 points as Celtics rally to defeat Grizzlies 117-112
articles.description:
The win kept Boston in second place in the East, 1 1/2 games ahead of the Knicks.

The post Jaylen Brown has 30 points as Celtics rally to defeat Grizzlies 117-112 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jaylen Brown scored 30 points, leading the team to victory.
Boston remains second in the Eastern Conference, 1.5 games ahead of the Knicks.
